findings.title: HwangTaehyun/oh-my-agentic-score
findings.description: Oh My Agentic Score (OMAS) — Measure and visualize AI agent thread-based engineering capabilities. 4-dimension scoring: More (Parallelism), Longer (Autonomy), Thicker (Density), Fewer (Trust).

findings.title: MikeeBuilds/Squadron
findings.description: The Agentic Operating System for your desktop. Squadron is a native command center that lets you manage swarms of local AI agents (Gemini, Claude, Codex) as if they were employees. Features a 6-terminal parallel workbench, Kanban task management, and deep integration with Jira/Linear to turn AI autonomy into real engineering work.

findings.title: RayP11/QuestChain
findings.description: Truly local AI agent running entirely on your hardware. Autonomous tasks, file & shell access, Telegram updates, cron jobs, and RPG progression.

findings.title: cmmchsvc-dev/Galactic-AI
findings.description: Galactic AI v1.6.9  Sub-Agent Update 🚀 Sovereign, local-first agentic system built for absolute autonomy. Boasting 190+ native tools, browser extension, seamless desktop control, and true persistent memory that learns with you. Driven by a blazing ReAct agent loop to deliver elite, unchained automation with zero forced cloud overhead.

findings.title: kompassdev/kompass

findings.title: rdunie/venutian-antfarm
